### Bug: Sidebar Icons Mismatch Index Tracking

<!-- **Medium Severity** -->

<!-- DESCRIPTION START -->
Expandable items in `MacOSSidebar` show the wrong expand/collapse icon state. The `_expandedIndices` set, which tracks items by their original index, is incorrectly queried with the item's flat index in `_buildAwesomeSidebarItem` and `_buildSidebarItem`.
<!-- DESCRIPTION END -->

### Bug: Email Label Rollback Fails to Restore Original State

<!-- **Medium Severity** -->

<!-- DESCRIPTION START -->
The rollback logic for email label modifications in `markEmailReadStatusWithRecovery` and `toggleEmailStarWithRecovery` appears to incorrectly reverse the original operation. When an initial label change (like marking as read/unread or starring/unstarring) fails, the subsequent rollback attempt uses `addLabelIds` and `removeLabelIds` in a way that does not properly restore the email's previous state.
<!-- DESCRIPTION END -->

### Bug: Sidebar Icons Show Incorrect State

<!-- **Medium Severity** -->

<!-- DESCRIPTION START -->
The expand/collapse icons in `_buildAwesomeSidebarItem` and `_buildSidebarItem` use the `flatIndex` to check `_expandedIndices`, which stores `originalIndex` values. This causes the icons to display an incorrect expanded/collapsed state.
<!-- DESCRIPTION END -->
